assertionResults.title: JetBrains Mono loaded globally
assertionResults.reason: Computed-font audits on dashboard/agents/issues each reported 6 visible-text violations using ui-monospace or ui-sans-serif instead of JetBrains Mono.

evidence.consoleErrors: none in baseline page captures (console-dashboard.txt, console-agents.txt, console-issues.txt)

assertionResults.issues: Font stack fallback classes (ui-monospace/ui-sans-serif) are still active on multiple visible text elements.

assertionResults.title: Pink/rose background palette
assertionResults.reason: Computed root background audit shows body background rgb(196, 135, 142), matching palette color #C4878E.

evidence.network: Dashboard page load requests captured (network-agents.txt/network-issues.txt include common boot APIs).

assertionResults.title: Zero border-radius globally
assertionResults.reason: Border-radius audit reported 0 violations on dashboard, agents, and issues pages.

evidence.network: Standard GET boot/API traffic observed in network logs.

assertionResults.title: 1px borders as dividers, no shadows
assertionResults.reason: Audits found boxShadow violations = 0 and confirmed presence of multiple 1px solid border elements (dashboard:16, agents:12, issues:7).

evidence.network: Normal API fetches captured during page loads.

assertionResults.title: CSS custom properties defined
assertionResults.reason: All required :root design-system variables were present with non-empty values; missingVars was empty.

evidence.network: GET boot/API calls observed in network logs.

assertionResults.title: No CSS gradients anywhere
assertionResults.reason: Gradient audit reported 0 elements with linear/radial/conic gradient backgroundImage across tested pages.

assertionResults.title: No loading spinners
assertionResults.reason: Global CSS audit detected keyframes named spin/ping/pulse; contract disallows spin-style loading animations even though no active spinner elements were detected in DOM.

evidence.consoleErrors: WebSocket closed without opened (console-final.txt) observed after API-blocked experiment; baseline page captures had none.
evidence.network: API interception used for loading-state simulation; normal requests restored afterward.

assertionResults.issues: Presence of @keyframes spin in loaded styles violates strict no-spinner assertion wording.

frictions.description: Offline-mode reload failed with net::ERR_FAILED, so loading-state validation used temporary API request interception instead.
frictions.resolution: Applied agent-browser network route "**/api/**" --abort, captured screenshots/audit, then removed route and reloaded normally.

summary: Tested 7 assigned GUI foundation assertions: 5 passed and 2 failed (VAL-GUI-FOUND-001 font-family compliance, VAL-GUI-FOUND-010 no-spinner strict keyframe rule).
